name: Oat Breakfast
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil water, oats, molasses, currants, and sugar.
2. Reduce the flame to low.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (cinnamon, nutmeg, brown sugar) and stir occasionally.
4. Cook until all liquid has been absorbed, which should take about 15-20 minutes.
5. Serve hot.
For a creamy texture, mix in some pumpkin puree after removing from heat.
